description: Replace science-advantage's Prisma-based vitest setup with a Drizzle-based one. Run drizzle-kit migrate once per integration run, split unit/integration setup files, keep truncate-and-reseed for per-test cleanup. Sub-track unblocks Track 3 Phase 1+ runtime verification.
deviation_notes: Carved out of Track 3 (prisma_drizzle_science_controllers_20260505) Phase 0 retrospective. Track 3 pilot revealed vitest.setup.ts's `prisma db push --force-reset` is incompatible with Drizzle-first schemas: Prisma's CREATE TYPE has no IF NOT EXISTS path and collides with Track 1's migration 0013 types. Pulling this work forward from tech-debt because it is now the critical path for every remaining Track 3 phase.
